steps.title: Undo the division
steps.content:
The variable $r$ is divided by $42$, so multiply both sides by $42$.
$$\frac{r}{42}=s+t$$
$$r=42(s+t)$$

steps.title: Keep the sum grouped
steps.content:
The entire quantity $s+t$ is multiplied by $42$, so the expression must keep that sum in parentheses.
The answer is C.
